headline: Host Hotels & Resorts Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Call to be Held on August 6, 2026
summary: BETHESDA, Md., June 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”), the nation’s largest lodging real estate investment trust, will report second quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, August 5, 2026, after the market close. The Company will hold a conference call to discuss its second quarter 2026 results and business outlook on Thursday, August 6, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET. Conference call access information is as follows: Conference Call: USA/Canada T
